name: Alex Hartley
workAuthStatement: British citizen, full right to work in the UK.
cvText:
Alex Hartley — BSc Economics, London School of Economics, Expected June 2027

Contact: alex.hartley@lse.ac.uk | London, UK

Education
London School of Economics, BSc Economics, 2024–2027
First Year: 71 average (modules: Microeconomics, Statistics, Mathematics for Economists)
Relevant modules: Financial Markets, Econometrics, Industrial Organisation, Macroeconomics
Dissertation: Housing supply elasticity across UK local authorities (panel regression, R) — provisional grade 73
A Levels: Mathematics A*, Economics A*, History A (Harrow County School, 2024)

Experience
Investment Banking Insight Programme — Rothschild & Co, London, June 2026 (1 week)
Shadowed analysts in the debt advisory team on a live infrastructure refinancing. Attended a client update call; prepared a summary of comparable transactions for a senior analyst.

Research Assistant — LSE Department of Economics, January–March 2026 (part-time)
Cleaned and merged three ONS datasets for a project on regional productivity divergence; ran descriptive regressions in Stata; flagged inconsistencies in the 2011 boundary revision data.

Activities
Treasurer, LSE Rowing Club, 2024–2025: resolved an 800-pound deficit, renegotiated supplier contracts, secured sponsorship; summer tour attended by 24 members (record).
Co-organiser, LSE Economics Society Annual Panel, January 2025: sourced replacement speaker in three days when original dropped out; 120 attendees, society record.
Competitions: CFA Research Challenge participant (team finished second in regional round, 2026).

Skills
Quantitative: R (ggplot2, fixest, lm), Python (pandas, matplotlib), Stata, Excel (PivotTables, VLOOKUP, basic VBA), SQL
Languages: English (native), French (B2)
Other: Bloomberg terminal (introductory certification)
